nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 森林
nodes.summary: 森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联402种鸟类，包括疣鼻棲鴨、Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan等402种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Black-necked red cotinga
nodes.summary: Black-necked red cotinga（Black-necked red cotinga，学名 Phoenicircus nigricollis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联8个分布地点节点。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The black-necked red cotinga (Phoenicircus nigricollis) is a species of bird in the family Cotingidae, the cotingas. It is found in Brazil, Colombia, Ecuador, Peru, and Venezuela.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: | title =Birds of Venezuela | publisher =Princeton University Press | edition =second | date =2003 | location =Princeton NJ | page =660 | language =English }} Its range slightly overlaps that of the Guianan red cotinga in the vicinity of the lower Tapajós River. The black-necked red cotinga inhabits humid terra firme forest. In elevation it reaches in Colombia, in Ecuador, in Venezuela, and in Brazil
